EXPERIMENT 1 — CONTROLLED NATUFIAN / PREHISTORIC PANEL
EXPANDED COMPLETE INDIVIDUAL COHORTS

Every one of the 196 targets below is modeled against the identical seven explicitly
named ancient sources. The target block contains Italki Jews, ten regional Ashkenazi
population averages, all 14 individuals from the Reddit poster's chosen Calabria and
Sicily labels, all 26 available Campanians, all 8 Maltese, all 111 available Cretans,
and all 26 available Dodecanese, Rhodian, and Kos targets. No individual inside any
declared cohort was selected or removed according to its Natufian result.

The pooled Ashkenazi result is a separate matched supplemental run and is therefore
not inserted into this 196-row target block. See results/context/.

==================== SOURCES ====================
